scripts.check:layout: test -f README.md && test -d providers && test -d shims && test -d packages && test -d ops
scripts.prompt:build: uv run --project packages/prompt-factory prompt-factory build --profile all
scripts.prompt:diff: uv run --project packages/prompt-factory prompt-factory diff --profile local_repos
scripts.prompt:promote: uv run --project packages/prompt-factory prompt-factory promote --profile local_repos
